title: Scared Behavior
description: Allows the a mob to become scared when the weather outside is thundering

sound_interval.title: Sound Interval
sound_interval.description: The interval in which a sound will play when active in a 1/delay chance to kick off

priority.title: Priority
priority.description: As priority approaches 0, the priority is increased. The higher the priority, the sooner this behavior will be executed as a goal.
